agent cli

native macOS cockpit — real agents in real terminal panes, built on Ghostty's engine, none of the IDE chrome · 9 slices · 4 shipped

Open app → pick folder → real claude/codex in a real terminal pane (libghostty-vt) → tabs=projects, panes=agents, file rail, inline editor. Build our own, leveraging open-source components. libghostty-vt verified. v0 = ONE live pane.

Core (terminal + shell)UI (rail, editor, chrome)Research & spikes🔒 launch blocker

Now

Rocks · foundational & risky

LSPIKE2 · Render + input loop — the rockCore (terminal + shell)
v0🔒

Extend the parsing spike (which is proven): pty → libghostty-vt → CANVAS PAINT + KEYBOARD ROUNDTRIP in a real window. Proves the three things parsing didn't — rendering to pixels, input encoding back to the pty, and fullscreen-TUI correctness (claude's own alt-screen UI) at terminal speed. Do this BEFORE scaffolding the app.

Done criteria

Type in a canvas-rendered pane running a real shell; output appears; arrow keys + ctrl-c work; claude's TUI renders correctly; no visible lag on fast output.

de-risks the entire app

Next

Rocks · foundational & risky

MSCAFFOLD · Tauri 2 app scaffoldCore (terminal + shell)
v0🔒

Tauri 2 + React/TS/Vite frontend + Rust backend. Native window, IPC channel wired backend↔frontend. Empty but real — the container the SPIKE-2 pipeline drops into.

Done criteria

Native window opens; a message round-trips backend↔frontend over IPC; builds clean with the pinned Zig toolchain.

MCORE · One agent pane (v0 done)Core (terminal + shell)
v0🔒

Native folder picker → spawn claude in that cwd → one interactive terminal pane using the SPIKE-2 pipeline. Persist the last folder, reopen on relaunch. This IS v0.

Done criteria

Open app → pick folder → run claude → type and see output, feels like a real terminal. Relaunch reopens the folder.

Later

Rocks · foundational & risky

MTABS · Tabs = projectsUI (rail, editor, chrome)
v1

Add/switch project folders as tabs, multiple projects in one window. Native folder-open per tab.

Done criteria

Open 3 project folders as tabs; switch between them; each keeps its own state.

LPANES · Multiple panes per tabCore (terminal + shell)
v1

Grid of terminal panes per tab, each its own pty/agent. Pane focus, new pane (n), close pane (x). Watch memory/CPU with N concurrent agents (see ARCHITECTURE.md).

Done criteria

3 agent panes visible at once in one tab, each interactive; n adds, x closes, focus moves.

LEDITOR · Inline editor pane (CodeMirror)UI (rail, editor, chrome)
v2

Double-click a file in the rail → CodeMirror 6 editor pane, inline in the grid, real syntax highlighting. This is the 'looks like VSCode's editor' requirement — built directly, not via code serve-web.

Done criteria

Double-click a .tsx file → it opens in an editor pane with line numbers + syntax highlighting, editable, save works.

Pebbles · features

STHEME · mono-ghost theme + session persistenceUI (rail, editor, chrome)
v1

Apply the already-approved mono-ghost palette (ghostty/config has the values). Persist tabs + panes across restarts.

Done criteria

App looks like the approved demo; relaunch restores tabs and panes.

MRAIL · File rail + previewUI (rail, editor, chrome)
v2

Yazi-style file tree with inline preview, per the demo's left rail. Git status indicators.

Done criteria

Rail shows the project tree; selecting a file previews it; dirty files marked.

MWORKTREE · Worktree helperCore (terminal + shell)
v3

One keystroke: new pane = git worktree add + agent launched inside it, named and disposable. The 'multiple agents on one repo, parallel' workflow.

Done criteria

From a project tab: new-worktree-agent in <5s; cleanup removes the worktree + branch.

✅ Shipped (4)
MS-OSS · OSS landscape survey + tool evaluationsResearch & spikes
v0

July 2026: surveyed the field (zellij, Superconductor, hashmark, cmux, Mux0, Supacode). zellij trialed then parked (static-config model, not 'open a folder'). Superconductor/hashmark/cmux evaluated in depth. All reference only — the decision is build-our-own.

Done criteria

Drove the build-our-own direction. Rejected options documented in PARKED.md/DECISIONS.md with reasons. ✓ 2026-07-07

SS-EDITOR · Editor-fidelity spike (helix)Research & spikes
v0

hx sample.tsx next to the VSCode screenshot — confirmed a real editor with tree-sitter highlighting reads right. Informs the EDITOR slice (now CodeMirror in-app, not a TUI editor).

Done criteria

PASS, logged in DECISIONS.md. ✓ 2026-07-07

MS-AUDIT · Blind-spot audits (drift + fork decision)Research & spikes
v0

Two 16-framework /blind sweeps caught real drift: demo-replaced-the-trial, and an asymmetric 'cmux is best' verdict. Second audit corrected a false claim (cmux chrome IS themeable) and, with Jason's pushback, steered back to build-our-own. docs/blind-audit-*.html.

Done criteria

Findings logged in ERRORS.md; direction corrected. ✓ 2026-07-07

MS-SPIKE1 · libghostty-vt parsing spike — PASSEDCore (terminal + shell)
v0

spike-ghostty-vt/: real pty (portable-pty) → real 'ls -la -G' → real ANSI codes → libghostty-vt Terminal::vt_write parses → cell-by-cell readback matches exactly. Proves the terminal ENGINE choice (Ghostty's real parser in a Rust backend, not xterm.js). Caught the Zig 0.15.2 pin requirement.

Done criteria

Compiles + runs correctly, verified 2026-07-07. Logged in DECISIONS.md. ✓ 2026-07-07
